user.title: Smart Lock Manager
user.description: Configure a Z-Wave lock to manage. Select the lock entity, give it a friendly name, and choose how many code slots to expose.

init.title: Smart Lock Manager
init.description: Reconfigure this lock. Changing the slot count reconciles the slot collection and clears slots above the new limit.

data.notify_service: Notify service (notify.* to send alerts through)
